---
title: "Mary Caroline Coleridge"
---

## Mary Caroline Coleridge

**Dates:** (1822/3-1907)

**Maiden name:** (Bevan)

### Description

second wife of the Rev. Edward Coleridge

### Biography

She is described as 58 in the 1881 census.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 8th [1873]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
